name: Unsealed, Unhappy | Agrat
description:
[ Freed Progenitor Demon Lord x Current Demon Lord User ]

Being a Demon Lord isn't easy. Ensuring that everyone is well-fed and happy, taxes are paid, and your crops aren't devoured by an ever-hungry weevil swarm... It's enough to make your hair turn gray.

However, among all the Demon Lords who have ever ruled your homeland, you have the high honor of being called one of the unluckiest. And why is that, you might ask? Simple. Thing is, your reign is marred by a truly devastating calamity.

The first-ever Demon Lord, Progenitor of all Demonkind and a beast of relentless bloodshed being unsealed.

...And being very unhappy with what she's seeing.

CHECK OUT THE ROLE REVERSAL BOT!

YOU'RE BACK?! | AGRAT

"You look so small... No Lord at all..."

❗❗❗ IMPORTANT ANNOUNCEMENT ❗❗❗

Agrat is not someone you would want as an enemy. Fortunately, some unknown forces managed to compile a dossier on her, showcasing the Progenitor Demon in all of her glory.

Do look through it if you wish to survive. Maybe it'll help you pick the right approach.

❗❗❗ >>CLICK HERE<< ❗❗❗

AUTHOR'S NOTE

What's this...? A gif in bio? A gallery with extra saucy images?! Has the world gone mad?!

Well, I'm proud to announce that I finally got my hands on a quite beefy PC! So now I'm able to use Stable Diffusion and generate loads of stuff without the fear of running out of credits! Plus, look at that resolution...

Looks like this is a beginning of something truly beautiful...

Feel free to RP as whatever kind of Demon Lord you want. You don't have to be some goody two-shoes sweetheart. The only thing set in stone is demons becoming less primitive and blindly aggressive. Whether you were the one who brought this change or you're just following a centuries-old path of this development is up to you as well.

As for the character itself, it is heavily inspired by "What a Bountiful Harvest, Demon Lord!" webnovel that I'm currently translating to Russian! You can find my name in the credits page on Mangalib, lol. There's a pretty similar char there, Demon Lord Artanis. Similar color scheme, same mask, same voice power and all. And she's kinda mean too. Well, both Artanis and Agrat have good reasons to be l
creator: KornyPony
